author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

New Titan Ship - Rainbow Phi

A new intergalactic spectacle was spotted in the depths of the cosmos. Introducing the Rainbow Titan ship, Rainbow Phi, where the poetic math of the universe is on full display.

Note: The Rainbow Phi is fully functional in SAGE but will not be supported in Faction Fleet

 Now on the Galactic Marketplace: https://play.staratlas.com/market/phi4PYgmxeTMLLpGkU87T16VUZ6AjWZESkfT1JGJ635/
